Operation 'getSessionDetails' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about required input parameters (wid and sid) and doesn't explicitly state what the SessionDetail response object contains. Enhanced description specifies both required path parameters, clarifies the return value structure, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation versus the search operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific session recording including visitor info, pages visited, tags, and traffic source.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information about a specific session recording for a website. Requires the website ID (wid) and session ID (sid) as path parameters. Returns comprehensive session details including visitor information, pages visited, session tags, traffic source, and additional metadata. Use this operation to access the full SessionDetail object for analysis or playback preparation.
